title: Central Heater
description: A mod that adds some stoves which could cook things faster, compatible with hoppers and minecarts except for the brick variants. Also a way to automate diamonds.
body:
## Description

**Check our github page:** [The Github Page](https://github.com/Toswapxedzur/Central_heater)

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce7b742ec249aea4b52b1b57402209239c0cdc5a_0.webp)


## 📖 Overview

🔥 **Central Heater** is a small mod that took a gentle expansion on the heating category of minecraft. It adds many small but useful features that is related to smelting. It allows player to smelt large amount of item at the same time in stoves, without the need to build a super smelter, thereby getting the name central heating, it also adds many unique recipes which allows the automation of diamond and netherite, though extremely difficult. The mod fills in the gap of soul firing, as now you can smelt item with even higher temperature with the fire coming from nether in stoves.

📦 This mod adds a total of 111 items(for now), about 60 of them are blocks

**📖 Recommend to install jei as a recipe viewer:** [Just Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)

🔍 We have extensive support over Just Enough Items, you can view all the items, recipes and extra information of the mod

![image9](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ysrTgLl2/images/edee4ebdd608af326399c8225312df4e05e34def.png)

## ✅ Features
- 7 types of stove block that can help you cook things faster, but they also consumes fuels

- Campfire also consume fuels now

- New decorative block brick tiles, including stone brick, deepslate brick, mud brick, red nether brick and much more, with stair, slab and walls variant

- Several type of stone brick, which is used to craft brick related block

- Throwable stone and deepslate cobble

- Fire Ashes and Scorched Dust, produced by burning any kind of fuels

- Unique seething recipe for nether tier stoves, basically smelting using soul flames,  can turn item into their nether counterpart, put soul related item in the fuel slot to make the soul fire

- Complex procedure to produce scorched coal, ideal for fuels of soul flames

- Adds pots and reworked cauldron, you can put 4 item inside and process them, but they require a lit stove to give them heat

- A new material called sturdy brick, can craft armor and sword, and even a tank that can store fluids, as strong as diamonds but can not be enchanted

- Some burnt food which can give you nausia if you tries to eat it

![image10](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ae991681fd7d55e41cbde8ccd29f1390c49f074_0.webp)

This is a automation setup for ancient debris, first input the lava by right clicking the cauldron with a lava bucket, then put in the coal blocks, making sure fuels is constantly replenished. After waiting a while, the coal block will turn into ancient debris and retrieved by the hopper under the stove (I coded hopper to extract item in the cauldron when placed below a stove)

## 📝 FAQ:

- **When will forge and fabric version come out?**

    I am actively working on porting this mod to forge 1.20.1, but no plan is made for porting to fabric in the near future. If you can port this mod to fabric, you can do it yourself and releasing it as a seperate mod, I would be very greatful.

- **Adding this mod to your modpack?**

    You absolutely can, I would very appreciate it. I don't really care about copyright or licenses, feel free to use it.
